text:
D0200C2 Resident Mood Interview - Trouble Sleep Frequency Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates if the resident is having trouble falling or staying asleep, or is sleeping too
much. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day)
^=Blank (skip pattern) discontinued 09/30/2023
124 D0200D1_LTL_ENRGY_CD D0200D1_LTL_ENRGY_CD D0200D1 Resident Mood Interview - Little Energy Code CHAR 1 The
